title: Shape
description: A compute shape that can be used to launch an instance. A shape determines the type of resources allocated, including CPUs, memory, and networking bandwidth.

availabilityDomain.description: The availability domain where the shape is available. Null if the shape is available across all availability domains.

ocpus.description: The default number of OCPUs available for this shape. For flexible shapes, this is the default when not specifying a custom value.

memoryInGBs.description: The default amount of memory available for this shape, in GB

processorDescription.description: A short description of the processor

networkingBandwidthInGbps.description: The networking bandwidth available for this shape, in Gbps

maxVnicAttachments.description: The maximum number of VNICs that can be attached

gpus.description: The number of GPUs available for this shape

gpuDescription.description: A short description of the GPU

localDisks.description: The number of local disks available for this shape

localDisksTotalSizeInGBs.description: The aggregate size of local disks in GB

localDiskDescription.description: A short description of the local disks

isFlexible.description: Whether the shape supports flexible OCPU and memory configuration

isBilledForStoppedInstance.description: Whether billing continues when the instance using this shape is stopped

quotaNames.description: The list of quota names associated with this shape

recommendedAlternatives.description: The list of shapes recommended as alternatives
